parameters.query:
INSERT INTO appointments (case_id, client_id, starts_at, ends_at, location_type, meeting_link, status)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.case_id ? $json.case_id : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.client_id }},
  '{{ $json.starts_at }}',
  '{{ $json.ends_at }}',
  '{{ $json.location_type.replace(/\'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.meeting_link ? "'" + $json.meeting_link.replace(/\'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  'programada'
)
RETURNING id, case_id, client_id, starts_at, ends_at, status;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { status: 'ok', appointment_id: $('Insertar Cita').item.json.id, starts_at: $('Insertar Cita').item.json.starts_at, ends_at: $('Insertar Cita').item.json.ends_at } }}

parameters.query:
SELECT id, case_id, client_id, starts_at, status
FROM appointments
WHERE status = 'programada'
  AND starts_at BETWEEN NOW() AND (NOW() + INTERVAL '24 hours')
ORDER BY starts_at ASC
LIMIT 200;

INSERT INTO case_events (case_id, event_type, event_payload, created_by)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.case_id ? $json.case_id : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.event_type }}',
  '{{ $json.event_payload.toJsonString().replace(/\'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  'wf_agenda_cron'
);
